zh.lifeSummary: 當John Woodhouse於1375年出生在英國諾福爾可吉波利時，他的父親John Woodhouse I25歲，母親Margaret Fastolfe19歲。他於1400年與Alice Furneaux結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1431年1月27日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Woodhouse于1375年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，他的父亲John Woodhouse I25岁，母亲Margaret Fastolfe19岁。他于1400年与Alice Furneaux结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1431年1月27日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places (in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Yorkshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, and elsewhere) called Woodhouse, or a topographic name for someone who lived at a ‘house in the wood’ (Middle English wode, hous, Old English wudu, hūs).

variant of Woodiwiss , from Middle English wodewose, which by the 16th century was sometimes written as wodowes, woodose, and wodehouse. The confusion with woodhouse probably arose because both words (and both names) were pronounced /wudus/ or /wudǝs/ in local dialect.

variants.name: Woodis
meanings: perhaps a nickname from Old English wuduwāsa‘faun, satyr’.
alternatively, a shortened form of   Woodhouse  .

variants.name: Woodiwiss
meanings: English (mainly Derbyshire and Yorkshire): nickname from Middle English wodewose, wodewese (Old English wudewāse) ‘wild man of the woods’. This word was also used to denote a person dressed to represent such a being in a play or pageant. Wodewoses (male and female) were mythical creatures of English and ancient Germanic folklore, akin to the fauns and satyrs of Classical mythology. The surname may also have been acquired by someone who lived and worked in the woods or perhaps by an unusually hairy man.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Woodhouse was born in 1375, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, his father, John Woodhouse I, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Fastolfe, was 19. He married Alice Furneaux in 1400. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 27 January 1431, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Woodhouse est né en 1375, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Woodhouse I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fastolfe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Furneaux en 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1431, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Woodhouse 1375 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Woodhouse I 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Fastolfe 19. Er hat 1400 Alice Furneaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 27. Januar 1431 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Woodhouse è nato il nel 1375 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Woodhouse I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Fastolfe, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Furneaux nel 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 27 gennaio 1431, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Woodhouseが1375年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで生まれた時，父John Woodhouse Iは25歳，母Margaret Fastolfeは19歳であった。1400年にAlice Furneauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1431年1月27日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Woodhouse(이)가 1375년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Woodhouse I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fastolfe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1400년 Alice Furneaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1431년 1월 27일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Woodhouse nasceu em 1375, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Woodhouse I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fastolfe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Furneaux em 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1431, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Woodhouse родился в 1375 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Woodhouse I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fastolfe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Furneaux в 1400 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 27 января 1431 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Woodhouse nació en 1375, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Woodhouse I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Fastolfe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Furneaux en 1400. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 27 de enero de 1431, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
